texto: And I feel like the Queen of Water. I feel like water that transforms from a flowing river to a tranquil lake to a powerful waterfall to a freshwater spring to a meandering creek to a salty sea to raindrops gentle on your face to hard, stinging hail to frost on a mountaintop, and back to a river again.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a María Virginia Farinango: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “And I feel like the Queen of Water. I feel like water that transforms from a flowing river to a t…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, metamorphosis, water pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e dia-chuvoso.
